# Plan: Complete Topics and Progress Features

## Summary

Implement and finalize the topics and progress tracking features with data integration and UI updates

## Tasks

1. Complete Topic Progress Data Model and Storage Integration
2. Implement Topics Progress UI Component in src/pages/TopicsProgress.tsx (depends on: Complete Topic Progress Data Model and Storage Integration)
3. Enhance Progress Page Data Aggregation and Visualization (depends on: Complete Topic Progress Data Model and Storage Integration, Implement Topics Progress UI Component in src/pages/TopicsProgress.tsx)
4. Add Unit and Integration Tests for Topics Progress Features (depends on: Implement Topics Progress UI Component in src/pages/TopicsProgress.tsx, Enhance Progress Page Data Aggregation and Visualization)
